title: I Will Survive
why_this_song: I Will Survive by Gloria Gaynor (1978) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 17 times; first heard in: "Oh no, not I, I will survive"
Appears 11 times; first heard in: "Oh, as long as I know how to love, I know I'll stay alive"
Appears 10 times; first heard in: "I've got all my life to live, and I've got all my love to give"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Did you think I'd crumble? Did you think I'd lay down and die?"
Appears 8 times; first heard in: "Oh, as long as I know how to love, I know I'll stay alive"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

lines: Oh no, not I, I will survive
Oh, as long as I know how to love, I know I'll stay alive
I've got all my life to live, and I've got all my love to give
And I'll survive, I will survive, hey, hey
And you see me, somebody new
I'm not that chained up little person still in love with you
And so you felt like dropping in and just expect me to be free
But now I'm saving all my lovin' for someone who's lovin' me

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "survive" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "survive" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "i'll" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "i'll" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: At first I was afraid, I was petrified
Oh no, not I, I will survive
And I'll survive, I will survive, oh

exercises.prompt_en: Imagine you are making a short film with "I Will Survive" as the soundtrack. What scene would you show while the chorus plays?
exercises.prompt_pt: Imagine que você vai fazer um curta com "I Will Survive" como trilha sonora. Que cena você mostraria no momento do refrão?

exercises.prompt_en: The singer makes a claim or statement in this song. Do you agree with it? Use evidence from the lyrics to support your answer.
exercises.prompt_pt: O cantor faz uma afirmação nessa música. Você concorda? Use pelo menos um verso para defender sua resposta.

exercises.prompt_en: Which single word from this song do you think carries the most emotional weight, and why?
exercises.prompt_pt: Qual palavra dessa música carrega mais peso emocional para você, e por quê?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
